# lol-tier-badge

<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Displays a color-coded tier badge (S / A / B / C / D) for LoL champion rankings.

## Properties

| Property | Attribute | Description                   | Type                              | Default |
| -------- | --------- | ----------------------------- | --------------------------------- | ------- |
| `tier`   | `tier`    | Tier value — S, A, B, C, or D | `"A" \| "B" \| "C" \| "D" \| "S"` | `"B"`   |
